privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a refactor-demo Maven project containing Calculator.java in the org.lable.oss.helloworld package. The project is copied from local data to /home/ga/IdeaProjects/refactor-demo during setup. The Calculator.java file contains a calc() method with parameters (x, y, o) and repeated logging code across 4 branches that matches the refactoring requirements. The pom.xml specifies Maven compiler target of Java 17. The source_repo metadata points to a real GitHub repository (LableOrg/java-maven-junit-helloworld) but the Calculator.java implementation in the task data is synthetic and not present in that GitHub repository.
